Create a prompt that provides instructions to write a clear, detailed spec for the code in this repo.

The spec by itself, without any other context, should include enough information to allow a coder or coding agent to write new code that implements the same features/functionality and the same UI design/layout/styling as the current code in this repo.

The spec should also describe the code's purpose, functionality, and requirements, and should provide instructions for setup and usage.

If anything is vague, unclear, or ambiguous, pause and ask me for guidance before you continue.

Save the prompt to .github/prompts/prompt-to-create-spec-for-entire-repo.md.
